name: gemini_image
description: Generate images using Google Gemini's Nano Banana Pro (gemini-3-pro-image-preview). Supports text-to-image AND image-to-image: pass reference_images (URLs from prior generations or uploads) to guide style/content. Quality-first defaults (16:9, 1K). Returns a task_id that completes asynchronously.

prompt.description: Detailed description of the image to generate. Be specific about subjects, style, composition, lighting, colors, and mood.

reference_images.description: URLs of reference images for style/content guidance (e.g., ['/ui/uploads/sunset_abc123.png']). Use for image-to-image generation. Max 14 images.

resolution.description: Image resolution: '1K' (1024px) or '2K' (2048px). Higher = more detail but slower. Default: '1K'

numberOfImages.description: Number of images to generate (1-4). Default: 1

returns: task_id (string) for async status tracking via get_task_status
example: gemini_image(prompt="a neon cyberpunk street at night", aspectRatio="16:9")
notes: Async operation - use get_task_status to check progress. For image-to-image, pass reference_images.
